pi_items.source: Explicitly hardcoded in export_result.sh for draft verification.
export_result.sh checks for the lowercase string "weekly triage report".
verifier.py awards full sorting points only if apache_count >= 5 and ilug_count >= 5.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real email data from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus (circa 2002). Verification scripts explicitly require the presence of Maildir folders ".Clients.Apache" and ".Clients.ILUG" (which contradicts the metadata claims lacking the leading dot). The verifier.py logic strictly requires a minimum of 5 sorted emails in each folder for full points. Additionally, export_result.sh checks the ".Drafts" folder for an email containing both "billing@consultancy.firm" and "weekly triage report".
